OVERVIEW: Redirect the serial input/output to this terminal.

USAGE: utmctl attach [--debug] [--hide] <identifier> [--index <index>]

ARGUMENTS:
  <identifier>            Either the UUID or the complete name of the virtual
                          machine.

OPTIONS:
  -d, --debug             Show debug logging.
  --hide                  Hide the main UTM window.
  --index <index>         Index of the serial device to attach to.
  -h, --help              Show help information.
